overall.description: Atmospheric video game footage of a dimly lit gothic classroom or great hall with students seated at wooden desks. A professor in dark academic robes walks through the candlelit room with tall arched windows. The scene features detailed stone architecture and moody lighting typical of a fantasy school setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic classroom with rows of wooden desks

events.description: professor in dark academic robes enters from left foreground and walks across the room

agents.ego_description: stationary camera observing the classroom from an elevated position near the back

notable_agents.action: professor in dark robes with hat walking from left to right across the foreground

entered.detail: tall arched windows with multiple panes allowing diffused natural light to enter
large decorative stone archway at the far end of the hall
rows of wooden desks and benches with students seated, arranged in orderly rows
grey stone tile flooring with visible texture and wear
wall-mounted iron sconces holding lit candles providing warm ambient light

segments.scene_description: A dimly lit gothic classroom or great hall with students seated at wooden desks arranged in rows facing the center. Tall arched windows on the left wall allow pale morning light to filter through, mixing with the warm flickering glow of wall-mounted candles. The stone architecture features high ceilings and a prominent archway at the far end. At approximately 7 seconds, a professor wearing dark academic robes and a hat walks across the foreground from left to right, temporarily obscuring the view of the students behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit gothic hall that transitions from a wide view of a scholarly assembly to a focused perspective behind a passing figure. It begins by capturing rows of students seated at wooden desks, where pale morning light from tall arched windows blends with the warm, flickering glow of wall-mounted candles. As the camera lingers on the high stone ceilings and the prominent archway at the far end, the atmosphere remains still and academic. The scene then shifts as a professor in dark academic robes and a hat walks across the foreground from left to right, temporarily obscuring the students and the architecture behind him.
